sections.content: board_changed is false - the click didn't select the purple. Maybe the purple is at a different column. Let me look at the bottom row more carefully. I see purple is the first colored square. Let me check the exact position by looking at the segmentation.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the segmentation to find exact positions of bottom palette items
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] <= 20:  # small items
        # Get approximate center
        boundary = n['boundary']
        if boundary:
            rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
            cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
            center_row = sum(rows) // len(rows)
            center_col = sum(cols) // len(cols)
            if center_row > 50:  # bottom area
                print(f"Bottom item: color={n['color']}, center=({center_row}, {center_col}), pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
